mapper.insert: INSERT INTO excel_mapping_templates ( template_name, header_structure, mapping_rules, target_sys_type, user_id ) VALUES ( #{templateName}, #{headerStructure}, #{mappingRules}, #{targetSysType}, #{userId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE excel_mapping_templates SET header_structure = #{headerStructure}, mapping_rules = #{mappingRules}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE template_name = #{templateName} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM excel_mapping_templates WHERE template_name = #{templateName} AND user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
